response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience and exposure to AI-agent infrastructure at Google, including MCP, which aligns with key requirements; however, his resume lacks clear evidence of 8+ years building production-grade AI solutions, direct experience with vector databases or RAG architectures, and leadership in technical discovery sessions with enterprise stakeholders, raising concerns about depth in GenAI-specific delivery.
strengths: Exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP at Google, directly relevant to role
Proven experience with cloud platforms (AWS), TypeScript, and scalable data systems
Strong track record of open-source contributions and technical mentorship via workshops
concerns: No explicit mention of vector databases, RAG, or LLM optimization in experience
Ambiguous duration and scope of AI work — 8+ years claimed but not clearly AI-focused
Lacks demonstrated leadership in customer-facing technical discovery or enterprise AI deployment
